note: Runs mutate a real project board. Use a throwaway board or low-stakes items.

evals.prompt: move https://github.com/<OWNER>/<REPO>/issues/<N> to In Review on the board
evals.expected_output: Board owner/number resolved from .claude/gh-workflow.config.json (or discovered/asked and offered to save). board.sh find used first; add only if absent; status set to "In Review" via board.sh, with field/option resolved by name.

evals.prompt: set priority P1 on issue #<N> (board has no Priority field)
evals.expected_output: board.sh set-field warns and exits 0; the skill reports the field doesn't exist on this board instead of erroring or retrying blindly.
